dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6030 IH: Puerto Rico Substance Use and Health Data Collection Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Hernández (for himself, Mr. Beyer, Mr. Torres of New York, Mr. Tonko, Mr. Goldman of New York, and Ms. Velázquez) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Energy and Commerce

form.official-title: To include Puerto Rico in National Survey on Drug Use and Health, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Puerto Rico Substance Use and Health Data Collection Act.

section.header: Inclusion of Puerto Rico in National Survey on Drug Use and Health
section.text: Section 505(d) of the Public Health Service Act (42 U.S.C. 290aa–4(d)) is amended by adding at the end the following:

paragraph.text: Beginning with fiscal year 2026, annual surveys carried out under this section shall include Puerto Rico.
